reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención de los playeros, encargado y responsable de la estación, muy atentos y amables, como así también las personas que atienden el servicompras, un lugar cálido y tranquilo para disfrutar de un desayuno o merienda ...

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants, manager, and station manager was excellent; they were very attentive and friendly, as were the people working at the convenience store. It's a warm and peaceful place to enjoy breakfast or a snack...
